arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk details how Slot has slotted in neatly at Liverpool – Keeping Reds on their toes
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has detailed how Arne Slot has fitted in neatly at Liverpool, replacing Jurgen Klopp with little fanfare. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the defender today made in an interview with Viaplay in which he lavishes praise on Slot and the work he’s done at Liverpool so far. arts.ttl: Man United issue update on Nottingham Forest clash amid chaos caused by Storm Darragh after Everton vs Liverpool was CALLED OFF
arts.sum: The club issued a statement on the fixture, scheduled to kick-off at 5:30pm, after the last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park was called off.

arts.ttl: Liverpool desperate to sign Premier League striker in January after Darwin Nunez troubles
arts.sum: Liverpool are still at the top of the Premier League standings despite losing two points in the title race against Newcastle United. The Reds played a 3-3 draw against Eddie Howe’s side, with Mohamed Salah once again inspiring Arne Slot’s side with a goal and an assist. arts.ttl: Peterborough criticise Thursday date for Everton tie
arts.sum: Peterborough United hit out at the decision to schedule their FA Cup third-round tie on a Thursday evening next month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea scouting highly-rated defender ahead of a potential move

The 18-year-old has been a first-team player for Porto this season and he has done quite well for them. arts.ttl: Man Utd fan Max Verstappen admits Liverpool soft spot and has 'sad' Ruben Amorim regret
arts.sum: F1 champion Max Verstappen admitted he is tempted by Virgil van Dijk's offer to visit Anfield despite his love for Manchester United, as he spoke to Mirror Sport at the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix
